title: D_comp and D_yield directional IPV signatures

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: D_comp and D_yield are directional diagnostic deviations relative to the InterHub human conditional norm, not standalone social ground-truth labels.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.b: Mean high-support and fallback deviation summaries.
panel_map.c: Mean interaction diagnostics and nonzero counts.

evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: The sign convention is valid, but the diagnostic values are not external behavioral labels.

statistics_notes: Scatter points are cells; bars show means with nonzero counts annotated.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: The sign convention is valid, but the diagnostic values are not external behavioral labels.
